title: The Vanquishing of the Witch Baba Yaga
original_title: The Vanquishing of the Witch Baba Yaga
overview: A descent into Eastern Europe's haunted woodlands uncovers the secrets, fairy tales, and bloody histories that shape our understanding of man's place in nature.
